title: EEG: Probabilistic Learning with Affective Feedback: Exp #2
description: This dataset comprises EEG recordings from 25 college-age participants performing a reinforcement learning task with affective feedback. Collected circa 2019 at the University of New Mexico's Clinical Research Center Lab, the data supports investigation of the reward positivity (RewP) component and its sensitivity to affective liking during probabilistic learning. This represents Experiment #2 of a multi-experiment study examining neural correlates of reward processing and emotional valuation. This dataset is a re-publication of OpenNeuro dataset ds003753 (v1.1.0) through NEMAR with identical data and structure.
methods_description: EEG data were collected from 25 college-age participants performing a reinforcement learning task with affective feedback. Data collection occurred circa 2019 at the Clinical Research Center Lab (CRCL) at the University of New Mexico.
